chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-418 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1925/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 1926/25 4.For hearing of main case 27-03-2025 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Office objection(s) to be complied with within a week. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. It is contended by counsel for the petitioner that petitioner applied for the post of Police Constable in connection with advertisement made by the respondents and qualified written test by securing 84 marks. Thereafter, interviews were conducted, wherein petitioner was also recommended for appointment; however, in the office of CCPO, all the results sent were changed and impugned list of the recommended candidates was issued. The list is provided by counsel today through statement, which is also taken on record. It is further contended that the entire results were changed to accommodate the blue eyed boys of the respondents. Be that as it may, let notices be issued to respondents and AAG for 08.05.2025. Meanwhile, respondents are restrained from issuing any appointment order in respect of impugned list. SSP, Sukkur is directed to place on record answer-sheets of all the candidates who appeared in the written test after the test conducted by SIBA. The respondent No.6 is also directed to place on record the result of written test on or before the next date of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
